channel.desc: The channel of the scheduled messages

cursor.desc: For pagination purposes, this is the `cursor` value returned from a previous call to `chat.scheduledmessages.list` indicating where you want to start this call from.

latest.desc: A Unix timestamp of the latest value in the time range. This field will be ignored if the API call is sent using a workspace-level token. `oldest` signifies the Unix timestamp of the earliest range you're interested in. `latest` signifies the latest. If both `oldest` and `latest` are specified, `oldest` must be less than `latest`.

limit.desc: Maximum number of original entries to return.

oldest.desc: A Unix timestamp of the oldest value in the time range. This field will be ignored if the API call is sent using a workspace-level token. `oldest` signifies the Unix timestamp of the earliest range you're interested in. `latest` signifies the latest. If both `oldest` and `latest` are specified, `oldest` must be less than `latest`.

team_id.desc: encoded team id to list channels in, required if org token is used

desc: Returns a list of scheduled messages.
